About Me

Passionate about Data & AI

Here's a bit about my background and what drives me.

I'm a B.Tech AI & Data Science student at Sri Muthukumaran Institute of Technology, Chennai with a CGPA of 8.13.

I have hands-on experience in Python, SQL, NLP, and transformer-based NER. I love exploring real-world datasets and turning raw numbers into meaningful business insights.

I've built projects ranging from AI-powered crop disease bots to sales EDA dashboards — and I'm always building something new!

Currently seeking entry-level roles in Data Analytics or Data Science.

Projects

Things I've Built

Real projects built with real data — each one taught me something new.

📊 Superstore Sales EDA Dashboard
✓ Completed

EDA on 9,994 rows of real Superstore Sales data across 21 columns — uncovering key business insights using Python and data visualisation.

  • Technology is the top-selling category — $836,154 in sales
  • West region is the most profitable — $108,418 profit
  • California dominates all states — $457,688 in sales
  • November is peak sales month — $352,461
  • Consumer segment contributes 50.6% of total revenue
PythonPandasMatplotlibSeabornJupyter NotebookEDA
View on GitHub →
🌾 AgriSense Bot — AI Crop Disease & Soil Intelligence
✓ Completed

WhatsApp-based AI bot for crop disease detection supporting 6 Indian languages with 97.4% accuracy across 38 crop diseases.

  • Achieved 97.4% accuracy across 38 crop diseases using EfficientNetB0
  • MobileNetV2 soil classification and OpenWeatherMap weather risk engine
  • Supports 6 Indian languages via Google Translate integration
  • Community Outbreak Map Dashboard with Folium and SQLite
PythonFlaskTwilio APIEfficientNetB0MobileNetV2FoliumSQLite
